name: Kay Xia
bio:
Designer, engineer, and creative who believes the best digital experiences feel alive. I build things that are useful, beautiful, and a little bit weird.

As tech grows more complex, interfaces should grow simpler and more joyful — inviting people in rather than gatekeeping. That's the thread through everything I make.

Currently at Northwestern studying Design Engineering and Film. Previously at DIS Copenhagen. Always drawing tigers.
philosophy: Design should surprise and delight. Technology should feel human. The gap between 'functional' and 'magical' is smaller than most people think — it just takes care and craft to close it.
